prestazioni: Engine swap to a **4ZC1-T** (1.8L turbocharged inline-4, 135 PS stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5** turbocharger, custom **Irmscher Motorsport** forged internals (8.5:1 compression), and a **HKS 264°/256° camshaft set** for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery

Full **Toda Racing** valvetrain upgrade including **Toda titanium retainers**, **Ferrea Racing valves (1mm oversized intake, 1mm oversized exhaust)**, and **Toda valve springs** to handle 9,000 RPM safely with a **Mocal oil cooler** and **Setrab 23-row core** for thermal stability

Custom **Irmscher Motorsport** ECU reflash paired with a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup** to manage boost levels up to **1.5 bar (21.7 psi)** on **VP Racing Q16 fuel** for 280+ WHP on a **Dynapack hub dyno**

Full **Irmscher Motorsport** drivetrain reinforcement: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, **PPG close-ratio 5-speed dogbox (IRMSCHER SPEC)**, **AP Racing CP6640 twin-plate clutch**, and **GReddy limited-slip differential** with 4.444 final drive ratio for drag strip launches
estetica: Full **Irmscher Motorsport GT2** widebody conversion with **carbon fiber fenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear)**, **custom aluminum hood with dual NACA ducts**, and **Rocket Bunny GT2-style overfenders** for aggressive stance and tire clearance (245/40/15 front, 275/35/15 rear on **Work Meister S1 3P 15x9.5 +15** wheels)

**Irmscher Motorsport** front bumper with **integrated Hella Rallye 3000 fog lights**, **custom aluminum splitter**, and **carbon fiber canards** (3-piece, adjustable angle), paired with a **Seibon carbon fiber rear diffuser** and **Irmscher Motorsport GT2 rear wing (2.2m width, 3D-printed aluminum mounts)**

Full **Irmscher Motorsport** interior overhaul: **Recaro SRD-E full carbon bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified)**, **Sparco 6-point harnesses**, **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, **custom aluminum shift knob (IRMSCHER SPEC, 4ZC1-T engraved)**, and **Defi BF Advance gauges (boost, oil temp, oil pressure, wideband AFR)** mounted on a **carbon fiber A-pillar pod**
